review_title: Easy to Use Payroll and All-in-One HR Solution That Saves Time and Effort.
description: I have had a good experience with Rippling. It has simplified and streamlined the HR and payroll activities. It used to take time to maintain employs and remuneration procedures, but currently it is all automated and streamlined using Rippling. The site aids in enhancing the productivity and minimizes human errors. It is particularly applicable when expanding businesses which would like to have everything under one roof. Some minor issues are overshadowed by much more positive aspects, and it is a sound way of HR and employee management.
author: Tarang G.
pros: Rippling is an extremely potent and convenient platform to manage staff, payroll and HR functions under a single platform. The most attractive is that it has an all-in-one system in which the HR, IT, and payroll are all linked to each other. This saves a lot of man work and time in the process. The ease of use is excellent. The dashboard is user friendly and requires minimal training even by new users. The employee management can be used to manage employee details, attendance, and performance easily. The system of pay is quick and correct. It also automatically calculates taxes, salaries and deductions which minimizes the mistakes. The other good thing is personalization. I'm able to configure workflows, approvals and work reports depending on the company requirements. The customer care is also responsive and attentive. They make decisions fast and steer in the right direction where necessary. All in all it is highly cost effective since it integrates several tools on one platform.
cons: The only bad thing about it is that the platform is sometimes confusing at the start due to numerous features. The time dedicated by new users might be necessary to discover it all. In some cases there are minor bugs or slowness in loading particularly with huge data. Besides certain advanced options are costly which might not be favorable to small enterprises that have a low budget. Detailed tutorials or guides should be provided to the beginners to have quicker knowledge of the platform.

review_title: Excellent for international payments and easy to use
description: My experience is very good. Rippling helps me receive my salary and reimbursements quickly. It is very easy to navigate and not confusing at all. I use it for everything: checking my payments, requesting time off, and managing my team. It is a great tool for people working internationally.
author: Andres H.
pros: I like that payments arrive on time and very quickly. It is excellent for international payments because I can receive money in dollars and Colombian pesos without problems. The interface is very easy to use on my phone and computer. Also, requesting expense reimbursements is fast and simple.
cons: I don't receive emails when my vacation days are approved; I have to check the app manually, but there is probably a configuration that I have disabled to mute all notifications. Also, when the company rehired me, a new account was created. This caused me to lose the configuration for my dollar account in Panama, and I had to contact support to fix it, because the only available country was Colombia. Additionally, the integration with Google Calendar generates an event when time off is approved; however, it is not an Out of Office event, so it doesn't automatically decline meetings, and the unavailable icon won't appear in Slack, so I have to manually create the Out of Office event.

review_title: Helpful pay platform once you've gotten used to it.
description: The platform gets the job done but you're often unsure if you've done your part right and figuring it out is often tough.
author: Kevin P.
pros: Splitting payment to multiple banks at the same time in one convenient location makes saving for taxes simple.
cons: The platform as a whole lacks a lot of intuitive and easy to navigate features leaving users lost and confused on how to operate.

review_title: My expirience with Rippling
description: In general i think that my expirience is pretty good there is more positive aspects for sure and i absolutly recommed the app
author: Amanda V.
pros: It is pretty easy to use the app, and also give you a lot of tools to track your time and activities, if there is some problems you can call and the customer support its pretty efficient. It is an exccelent tool to track your team on their activities, the managment is easier this way. Also makes the payroll more objective since is all tracked on the app and specify the activities you are doing day by day.
cons: Maybe that the tracker is not that easy to use when we have to separate the activities on the day or at least for me is not like practical enough.

review_title: Turn Key Solution for HR and IT Management
description: I am very pleased with Rippling's capability to satisfy many of our company's needs include HR, payroll, and device management. We have not run into very many issues at all since our set up went live.
author: Nicholas A.
pros: We enjoy using Rippling as it integrates with many pieces of our team's HR software. Additionally, the support our company is receiving from Rippling is tremendous compared to our previous products. The responsive and clear UI is a major plus as an end user. It is incredibly easy to navigate to your health care information and quickly switch to find/verify your pay check information. This really is an ideal solution for companies that want turn key HR assistance.
cons: So far our biggest gripe with Rippling is the usage of a Chatbot to navigate to support. We would prefer having a phone number readily available for support questions. As a small team, it is necessary for more than one person to be able to contact Rippling if critical HR issues arise.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Versatile and capable platform with excellent customer support
author: Joe M.
pros: Customer support has been excellent from the start. Their tax services are also very good, and help is always available when I need it.
cons: The user interface looks beautiful but it is often difficult to find what I need, so I need to ask customer support a lot.

review_title: Fantastic product with every solution you need in one place
description: Overall my experience with Rippling has been fantastic, I have appreciated the implementation team and my client loves the product!
author: Rachelle F.
pros: I value the variety of solutions offered all on one platform. They truly have every solution for onboarding, off boarding, IT, Payroll, Performance and more.
cons: Rippling could offer certain products on the platform to companies at a discounted rate who have less than 5 employees. They have great apps and options but every person is an additional cost. I believe more companies would start with Rippling if the other apps were part of the incentive for free with less than 5 employees.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient all-in-one HR and IT platform with a learning curve
description: Overall, our experience with Rippling has been positive. It has streamlined several administrative processes and improved visibility across HR and IT operations. The implementation required some effort upfront, but once in place, the platform has been reliable and efficient for daily use. While there are areas for improvement, particularly around customization and support responsiveness, it delivers strong value as a centralized system.
author: Oscar L.
pros: Rippling stands out for its all-in-one approach to HR, IT, and payroll management. Having employee data, device management, and onboarding workflows in a single platform significantly reduces manual work and improves efficiency. The interface is intuitive, and automation features—such as onboarding and offboarding—save considerable time. Integration with other tools is also a strong point.
cons: One drawback is that some advanced features can be complex to configure initially, especially without prior experience. Customization options, while powerful, are not always straightforward. Additionally, pricing can become relatively high as more modules are added, and occasional delays in customer support response times can be frustrating.

review_title: Accessible and intuitive across both app and web platforms
description: Very positive. I am able to use the app or website when needed to call out during times of an emergency. I am able to also check and change my bank accounts if needed
author: Banji B.
pros: User-friendly with seamless access via both app and website. The availability of customer support when needed.
cons: As of the moment, I have not had a negative experience with this product. I have not experienced any issues with bugs or program freezing during usage.

review_title: Positive Experience with Rippling HRIS System
description: I have had a positive experience with Rippling. I have found it easier to navigate than other HRIS platforms. It has made aspects of our HR departments jobs' easier.
author: Alyssa L.
pros: The wide range of reports I can pull. I also like the easy way of timekeeping and clocking/out on the web and the kiosks. I like the simplicity of the system while it offers many different HRIS aspects. It is also more affordable than other platforms we have used.
cons: The thing I like least about Rippling in the day to day timecard approvals. As a large company, it is difficult to do daily timecard approvals. I also do not like change requests as it takes many steps to complete each request. We also often find that the kiosk apps often do not work or keep employees clocked in form multiple days.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Streamlined HR and Payroll Management
description: My overall experience with Rippling was positive and productive. It offered strong functionality across HR, payroll, and compliance, which helped reduce manual work and improve accuracy. While it required some time to learn due to its robust features, it ultimately became an efficient and dependable system.
author: Sara F.
pros: I liked how Rippling centralizes HR, payroll, benefits, and IT into one platform, making it easy to manage everything in one place. The automation and integrations helped streamline onboarding, offboarding, and employee management, which saved time and reduced errors.
cons: While Rippling is very powerful, the wide range of features can make navigation feel overwhelming initially. Some processes required extra steps, and support response times could vary depending on the request.

review_title: Great Tool That Only Needs Slight Improvement
description: Overall, it was fairly easy to navigate on Rippling's portal minus the issue of finding the "home" button every once in a while. Rippling will do a good job of remind you of deadlines and action items so you won't miss them but sometimes the constant reminder will annoy you. As an employee at my firm, Rippling has made it helpful for me to navigate a lot of employee tools such as benefits, payroll, hsa, and time off and for that, I appreciate and am a happier employee because of it. I used ADP in the past and I feel that Rippling is easier to navigate. Although Rippling can definitely improve on the "home" screen button, I did find ADP even harder to navigate and find tools. Rippling is definitely an improvement from ADP in terms of navigating from tool to tool within the portal.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Compared to ADP, I find Rippling in general - much easier to navigate. I like how organized my time off requests are kept track of in Rippling, I can easily see my past and current time off requests as well as see the balance that I have remaining. Rippling has been great for keeping track of my current paychecks and has a storage for past paychecks.
cons: Sometimes, it is hard to find the "home button" when navigating to many different areas on Rippling, such as from moving to HSA to moving to payroll and then moving to time off requests which I have done many times, I often find myself at a lost to where the "home button" is. Sometimes, I find it easier to close out of my browser and log into Rippling again to save me time from navigating back to the home screen because I simply cannot find it. I also find it annoying that when we have to complete a performance review or complete our annual HSA and health benefit elections, that Rippling will email us every day multiple times a day until we complete this. The reminder is nice but needs to way less frequent. I don't like getting automatic emails twice a month reminding me I got paid today. I simply do not need this constant reminder and it also floods my inbox personally.

review_title: Clean UI, reliable HRMS, and well organised features
description: Compared to Asanify (which felt buggy and less reliable), Rippling is much more stable. I rarely need to reach out to HR because everything is available inside Rippling, so it has become the main HR portal for us.
author: Brijesh U.
pros: Rippling has the best UI I’ve used in an HRMS. Everything is clean and easy to navigate. The org chart is properly organised and very clear. Time and leave tracking is also well structured, and the leave categories are separated nicely (annual leave, optional holidays, etc.). I also like that my profile has all details in one place like joining date, employee number, salary details, and more. Performance reviews have been smooth and formatting is perfect.
cons: The learning curve is a bit steep in the beginning. We also faced a few onboarding issues while shifting from Asanify, but support helped and it got sorted before payroll.

review_title: My Personal experience as a Rippling user
description: Overall, Rippling made my HR experience very smooth, and I don't need to contact HR for my payroll needs, benefits queries and getting my leave requests approved. It is a very timesaving tool.
author: Sonika S.
pros: Rippling is incredibly easy to use. I liked how everything -payroll, benefits, and onboarding - was in one place. The tool can be customized easily for learning and goal management. The user interface is clean, modern and intuitive and is very user friendly.
cons: Sometimes the customer support response time felt slow when I had any urgent questions. The mobile application is convenient to use but doesn't have all the features that are available in the desktop version and is sometimes buggy.

review_title: How Rippling makes easy for us
description: What I like the best about rippling is that it brings everything related to employee management into one simple and easy to use platform.
author: Razel P.
pros: I genuinely appreciate how easy Rippling is to use. It's also supports all employee related data in one place.
cons: Possibly more onboarding review for an employee who just learning the ropes in that organization. There is small difference from the app.

review_title: Service quality is poor
description: Data integrity error. Rippling has made many mistakes in processing year-end reports, including employee W2s and form 940. Their support is not hands on to dive-in and fix the problem. Even after aknowledged the problem, they gone pass the deadline, still can not correct the W2 error. AI is great at answering questions, but no one is fixing problems.
author: Xin G.
pros: First impression is great, AI is helpful to get quick answers, but payroll data has mistakes and support is kicking the problem around for weeks.
cons: Sales pitch is great. Implementation is good. But after that, the actual service quality and support efficency does not match high price tag.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rippling for a scaling e-commerce business
description: Overall I really like the application and would highly recommend it to include lots of HR needs in one. I think the app needs to continue to innovate and add more into their services / expand scope based off customer needs, but love everything they have so far.
author: Caroline S.
pros: I love the ease of managing so many HR processes in one tool. It is easy to use for managing payroll, time off/vacation requests, understanding and selecting healthcare benefits, managing company passwords and logins, and tracking employee dates/documents/contracts easily.
cons: RPass is a bit buggy and has issues updating company passwords. I have found that it often times lags when new passwords have been updated and that it can glitch out when going between my admin and user account.

review_title: All-in-One HR and Payroll Solution That Simplifies Admin Work
description: Overall, my experience with Rippling has been very positive. It’s a comprehensive platform that brings payroll, benefits, HR, and IT together in one place, which has saved us a lot of time and reduced errors. The interface is clean and easy to navigate, and new hires find the onboarding process straightforward. While there’s a bit of a learning curve with some of the more advanced settings, the system’s flexibility and automation more than make up for it. Rippling has helped us streamline administrative work and focus more on supporting our team.
author: Tiffany H.
pros: Rippling makes it incredibly easy to manage all aspects of HR and payroll from one platform. I really appreciate how intuitive the system is — setting up new hires, running payroll, and managing benefits can all be done in just a few clicks. The integrations with other tools save time and reduce manual work, and the reporting features give clear visibility into everything from headcount to spending. It’s streamlined so much of our day-to-day admin.
cons: Some of the more advanced features can take a little time to learn, and occasionally I’ve had to dig around or contact support to figure out how to configure something. The support team is helpful, but response times can vary depending on the issue. It would also be great to see more in-app tutorials or guided tips for newer features so onboarding new admins is smoother.

review_title: Simple and practical HR platform for everyday employee needs
description: Overall my experience with Rippling has been very positive. It makes it much easier to handle the administrative side of work. I use it regularly to track my hours, check my salary payments, and review my benefits. Everything being centralized in one platform saves time and makes it easy to stay organized. The system is reliable and the interface is straightforward, so even routine tasks take just a few seconds.
author: Kaynan S.
pros: What I like most about Rippling is how easy it is to use in day-to-day work. At NextDay I mainly use it to log my hours, check my pay statements, and review my benefits. Having everything in one place makes a big difference. The interface is very clear and simple to navigate, so I can quickly find things like tax documents or salary information without needing to ask HR. For employees, it really simplifies a lot of the administrative side of work.
cons: One thing that could be better is the visibility around some payroll details. Sometimes I would like to see a clearer breakdown of certain deductions or calculations directly in the platform. It’s not a major issue, but having more transparency in those areas would make the experience even better.

review_title: A Powerful Operating System for Work—with a Learning Curve
description: Overall, my experience with Rippling was very positive, with a few real-world trade-offs. On the upside, Rippling genuinely delivers on its promise of being an all-in-one system for people operations. Having HR, payroll, benefits, and IT access tied together in one platform made onboarding, role changes, and offboarding feel seamless instead of fragmented. It reduced manual work and eliminated a lot of coordination headaches that usually live between teams. When everything was set up correctly, it felt incredibly powerful and efficient.
author: Victor G.
pros: Onboarding/offboarding isn’t just paperwork—it’s accounts, permissions, payroll, devices, compliance. Rippling automates the real operational pain points, not just the surface-level stuff.
cons: Steep learning curve Because Rippling does so much, it can feel overwhelming at first—especially for smaller teams or new admins. Power comes at the cost of simplicity.

review_title: The Ultimate All-in-One Workforce Platform
description: Overall, the platform is powerful and intuitive. While the initial setup for specific payroll configurations took some effort, the automation it provides for onboarding and employee management is unmatched by other platforms we've used As you add more modules (IT, HR, Device Management), the per-user monthly cost adds up quickly, which might be steep for very small startups.
author: Shania G.
pros: The best part is having IT, HR, and Payroll in a single dashboard. It eliminates the need for multiple logins and manual data entry across different platforms. Tax filings and direct deposits have been 100% accurate and on time since we switched.
cons: Generally very stable, though I’ve encountered minor UI glitches during bulk employee updates During peak times (like year-end filing), the response time from support can be slower than expected for a premium-priced product

review_title: Loving Rippling
description: Our overall experience with Rippling has been very positive. It significantly simplified workforce operations by unifying HR, payroll, benefits, and IT into a single platform with one employee data model. This reduced manual work, errors, and cross-team coordination. Day-to-day administration became faster and more predictable, especially around onboarding, offboarding, payroll runs, and access management. The automation allowed a lean team to support growth without adding overhead, while improving compliance and security. Employees also benefited from a clean, intuitive self-service experience. While some highly customized or global edge cases required workarounds, the trade-off was speed, consistency, and operational clarity. Overall, Rippling delivered strong ROI, improved scalability, and better control over people operations, making it a solid foundation for a growing organization.
author: Paolo R.
pros: Single source of truth: HR, payroll, benefits, and IT all tied to one employee record, eliminating duplicate data and reconciliation work. Exceptional onboarding/offboarding automation: Role-based workflows ensure new hires are productive on day one and access is removed immediately on exit. Time savings and efficiency: Significant reduction in manual coordination across HR, finance, and IT, allowing lean teams to scale. Clean, intuitive interface: Easy for both admins and employees to use, which reduced training and support requests. Strong compliance support: Automated payroll, tax filings, and document tracking lowered risk and administrative stress. Scalability: The platform grows smoothly with headcount without needing to re-architect processes.
cons: Limited flexibility for edge cases: Highly customized HR policies, union rules, or non-standard workflows can require workarounds. Global payroll depth: While improving, complex multi-country payroll scenarios are less robust than dedicated global payroll platforms. Cost at scale: As headcount grows and more modules are added, pricing can increase quickly compared to point solutions. Configuration complexity: The breadth of features means initial setup requires careful planning to avoid misconfigured workflows. Advanced reporting constraints: Standard reports cover most needs, but deeply custom analytics can be harder without exports.

review_title: Easy and user friendly
description: My overall experience is a positive one. Very easy to use and the help option is able to give you a true answer. It's a great system that allows for open communication with PTO requests and timecard changes with my employees.
author: Kelly S.
pros: Ease of use! Very user friendly and gives my employees the opportunity to make corrections and time adjustments on their own, which helps greatly when it's time to do payroll. I can also see any time card errors immediately and can make those adjustments throughout the week rather than at the end of the pay period.
cons: The amount of emails my new hires get during onboarding. That is the only complaint that I have at this time.

review_title: A Reliable All-in-One Platform for Payroll and Employee Management
description: Overall, my experience with Rippling has been very solid and dependable. It has made managing administrative tasks related to employees and payments much more structured and transparent. The platform helps reduce manual work by keeping payroll, payment processing, and employee information aligned, which improves accuracy and saves time. While there are small areas that could be more intuitive, Rippling performs reliably in day-to-day use and supports efficient workflow management across different responsibilities.
author: Melisa R.
pros: What I like most about Rippling is how efficiently it brings together employee management, payroll, and payment tracking in one platform. It offers strong value for money because it replaces the need for multiple tools, while still being easy to use and well organized. Managing interviews, onboarding-related tasks, and employee information is straightforward, and the payroll and payment processing features make it easy to review invoices, track hourly earnings, and understand exactly how and when payments are processed. The interface is intuitive, which reduces administrative time and makes day-to-day tasks feel streamlined rather than overwhelming. When issues or questions arise, customer support is responsive, and any minor bugs or system issues I’ve encountered have been addressed without significant disruption.
cons: What I like least about Rippling is that some features are not immediately intuitive, especially when navigating between different modules within the platform. Certain processes can feel slightly over-engineered for simple tasks, requiring more steps than expected. At times, system notifications or prompts are not very clear, which can cause minor confusion about next actions. Additionally, occasional small glitches or slow loading times can interrupt the workflow, though they are usually resolved quickly.

review_title: A Powerful All-in-One HR & IT Platform with Room to Gro
description: User-Friendly Interface: Many users find the platform intuitive and easy to navigate, which helps in managing HR tasks efficiently.
author: Jayasri T.
pros: All-in-One HR & IT Management: Rippling combines HR, payroll, benefits, and IT management in one seamless platform, which is super convenient. It saves companies from juggling multiple tools.
cons: Customer Support: A few users report that customer support can be slow or less responsive at times, which can be frustrating when dealing with urgent issues.
